name: delegate-coder
description: Delegate execution-heavy coding work to a cheaper local or CLI worker agent while the orchestrator keeps planning and final review.

interface.shortDescription: Route heavy coding work to a cheaper worker.
interface.longDescription: Delegate Coder routes bulk reading, implementation, refactoring, and first-pass review to a configured CLI worker such as local Qwen, MiMo, Aider, Codex, Gemini, or OpenCode. The orchestrator remains responsible for planning, architecture, safety checks, and final acceptance.
defaultPrompt: Set up Delegate Coder in this Codex project and ask before writing configuration.
Use the delegate worker to summarize this repository.
Use local Qwen for this bounded implementation task and review the worker diff.
